heading: Prohibition against sale of obligations by Federal departments and agencies after , without compliance with requirements of or without approval by Secretary of the Treasury; exemptionJune 30, 1966section 1717(c) of this title
label: 1717a Prohibition against sale of obligations by Federal departments and agencies after , without compliance with requirements of or without approval by Secretary of the Treasury; exemptionJune 30, 1966section 1717(c) of this title
text: After , no department or agency listed in may sell any obligation held by it except as provided in , or as approved by the Secretary of the Treasury, except that this prohibition shall not apply to the Government National Mortgage Association.June 30, 1966section 1717(c)(2) of this titlesection 1717(c) of this title
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as a part of the Participation Sales Act of 1966, and not as a part of the National Housing Act, which comprises this chapter or the Federal National Mortgage Association Charter Act which comprises this subchapter.
Amendments1968— substituted “the Government National Mortgage Association” for “secondary market operations carried on by the Federal National Mortgage Association”.Pub. L. 90–448
Effective Date of 1968 AmendmentFor effective date of amendment by , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 90–448section 808 of Pub. L. 90–448section 1716b of this title
